sections.paragraph:
Original: כּוכב

Transliteration: kôkâb

Phonetic: ko-kawb'

BDB Definition:

  1. star
    1. of Messiah, brothers, youth, numerous progeny, personification, God's omniscience (figuratively)

Origin: probably from the same as H3522 (in the sense of rolling) or H3554 (in the sense of blazing)

TWOT entry: 942a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine par
